name: The Rival
threat: A rival dungeon lord sends his monsters into your halls — and comes for your throne himself.
gimmick: Monsters invade instead of adventurers; it culminates in a boss-vs-boss showdown.
clearCondition: Defeat the rival boss when he reaches your throne.

name: The Inquisition
threat: Fanatical zealots, immune to fear, come to purge your dark works by holy law.
gimmick: Nullifies your Dark Pacts and purges undead — your tricks stop working, forcing a mundane defense.
clearCondition: Survive the purge and cut down the High Inquisitor.

name: The Pantheon
threat: The gods themselves answer — radiant avatars descend to scour the dark from your dungeon.
gimmick: Holy zones heal heroes and sear your minions; the fallen are resurrected mid-fight by divine grace.
clearCondition: Slay the descended Seraph before judgment is complete.

name: The Betrayer
threat: A traitor in your own ranks leads the raid and turns your dungeon against you.
gimmick: A defecting minion sabotages from inside — your own rooms and traps turn on you for the act.
clearCondition: Put down the Turncoat and reclaim your halls.

name: The Reckoning of the Dead
threat: A necromancer-king raises every soul you have killed this run to march against you.
gimmick: An undead tide whose size scales with your run's kill-count — your own victims, turned.
clearCondition: Survive the tide and destroy the necromancer-king.

name: The Forlorn Hope
threat: The realm's finest swear a death-oath — they will not flee, and they grow stronger as they fall.
gimmick: A martyr squad that never retreats, fights to the death, and empowers the living with each one slain.
clearCondition: Break the oath — kill the captain who binds them.

name: The Mage Tower
threat: The archmages bring reality-warping war — your dungeon's very rules unravel.
gimmick: Teleports your minions out of position, transmutes rooms, dispels your buffs, summons their own.
clearCondition: Kill the archmages before they unmake your dungeon.

name: The All-Stars
threat: A dream-team of legendary heroes assembles — each a champion, all in deadly concert.
gimmick: A coordinated elite squad, each hero a mini-boss with a signature ability that synergizes with the rest.
